figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of GUARDAD, a safeguard that captures the dynamic nature of autonomous driving and mitigates accident-prone decisions.

Table 2: Main results on the DriveLM benchmark for different AD-MLLMs, comparing the vanilla model with safeguard methods (RF, CM, SA, GA). We report the standard deviation (σ) and the change (∆). The GA (ours) columns are shaded in gray. Improvements are highlighted in red.

Figure 2: Framework of GUARDAD. GUARDAD is a model-agnostic safeguard that formulates AD safety as an evolving Markovian logical state. It constructs the safety state via Neuro-Symbolic Logic Formalization, induces a temporally consistent state through n-th order Markovian Logic Induction, and then performs Logic-Driven Action Revision to correct unsafe actions without modifying the AD-MLLMs.
